projects.title: Dev Portfolio
projects.bodyText:
- Developer Portfolio Website made in React
 -  Fully customisable and dynamic, easily change data and images.
 - Dark Mode Support

projects.title: Prescripto -Doctor Appointment platform
projects.bodyText:
- Developed a Doctor Appointment web application for seamless appointment booking and management.
- Implemented secure payment processing and image management features.
- Enhanced system efficiency, reducing booking errors and improving user engagement.

projects.title: Connect
projects.bodyText:
- Developed a real-time Chatting application enabling seamless communication among users.
- Designed an intuitive interface for enhanced user engagement and interaction.
- Integrated features for efficient message exchange and real-time updates.

projects.title: Spofity-clone Interface
projects.bodyText:
- Developed a Spotify interface clone using **HTML** and **CSS**.
- Replicated the user-friendly design and layout for enhanced visual appeal.
- Ensured responsiveness across different screen sizes for optimal user experience.
